task: The paper introduces a training-free framework designed to improve the fine-grained perception of MLLMs. The Scientific Objective is to mitigate the information loss caused by fixed-resolution vision encoders (like CLIP) when processing small objects. By using a task-guided cropping strategy, the model autonomously identifies regions of interest, 'zooms' into them, and integrates this local detail back into the global context to generate more accurate visual reasoning.

data.name: demo_imgs
data.description: Two Demo pictures used in experiment 1
